## Plugin reference

- Description: Image preview for .png, .jpg, .gif, .webp, .svg, and similar files.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `FilePane.Renderer` "Image" → `ImageView`
  - Uses: `conversations/conversation-view/code/file-pane.FilePane`
